lineItems.description: This LED lighting fixture is engineered with a durable die-cast aluminium housing, ensuring superior heat dissipation and long-term reliability. Available in elegant Matt White and Matt Black finishes, it seamlessly integrates into modern interior environments. The fitting is powered by high-performance Luminus LEDs with a total power consumption of 5x2W, delivering an արդյունավետ luminous efficacy of 70–80 lm/W for efficient illumination. It offers versatile colour temperature options of 3000K, 4000K, and 5000K to suit various ambience requirements. Designed with a 38° beam angle, it provides precise and uniform light distribution, ideal for accent and task lighting. With a high colour rendering index (CRI >90) ensures accurate and vibrant colour representation. Operating at a constant current of DC 600mA, the fixture maintains stable performance and longevity. The overall dimensions are 127x34x57mm with a cut-out size of 119x25mm, allowing for easy recessed installation. Rated IP20, it is suitable for indoor applications such as residential, retail, and commercial spaces.

4. Quotatiovdsczcszxcn valid for 30 days.

lineItems.description: This LED module is constructed with a high-quality aluminium housing, ensuring excellent heat dissipation and long-lasting durability. It operates at 9W power and is equipped with a reliable BRIDGELUX LED light source, delivering consistent and efficient illumination. The module is available in multiple colour temperature options of 3000K, 4000K, and 5000K, allowing flexibility for warm, neutral, or cool lighting applications. With a 38° beam angle, it provides focused and uniform light distribution, making it suitable for accent and general lighting. The high colour rendering index (CRI >90) ensures accurate colour representation, enhancing visual clarity in residential, retail, and commercial spaces. Designed to operate at a constant current of DC 200mA, this module ensures stable performance and energy efficiency over extended usage.

lineItems.description: This compact LED lighting fixture is crafted from high-quality aluminium, ensuring efficient heat dissipation and long-lasting performance. Available in elegant White and Black body finishes, it blends seamlessly into a variety of interior settings. The fixture operates at 9W power and is equipped with a premium CREE LED light source, delivering consistent and energy-efficient illumination. It is offered in 3000K and 4000K colour temperature options, suitable for warm and neutral lighting applications. With a 40° beam angle, it provides balanced and uniform light distribution, ideal for both accent and general lighting. The high colour rendering index (CRI >90) ensures accurate colour reproduction, enhancing visual appeal in residential, retail, and commercial spaces. Designed to operate at a constant current of 700mA, it ensures stable and reliable performance. With a compact product size of Ø48x67mm and a cut-out requirement of Ø44mm, the fixture allows for easy and precise recessed installation.

products.description: This recessed lighting fitting is designed with a sleek and modern profile, featuring a product size of 270 × 110mm and a cut-out requirement of 235 × 75mm for precise and seamless ceiling integration. It is engineered to provide both functional and aesthetic lighting performance, making it suitable for residential, retail, and commercial interiors. The fitting offers customizable design options with optional reflector finishes in Titanium, Shining, and Matt Silver, allowing it to complement a variety of interior styles. Its well-structured construction ensures durability and efficient light distribution, enhancing overall visual comfort and architectural appeal.

This recessed lighting fixture features a compact and efficient design with a product size of Ø71 × 89mm, making it suitable for modern architectural and interior lighting applications. It requires a cut-out size of Ø76mm for seamless ceiling integration, ensuring easy installation and a clean finish. The luminaire is designed with flexibility in aesthetics, offering optional reflector finishes including White, Matt Silver, Chrome, and Titanium Black, allowing it to complement a variety of interior styles. Its robust construction ensures durability and consistent performance, while the precision-engineered reflector enhances light distribution and visual comfort, making it ideal for residential, retail, and commercial lighting environments.

This high-performance LED fixture is constructed from robust die-cast aluminium, ensuring excellent thermal management and long-lasting durability. Finished in a sleek black body, it delivers a total power output of 24×2.2W using premium OSRAM LEDs, providing powerful and efficient illumination. The fixture is available in 3000K and 4000K colour temperature options, suitable for creating warm or neutral lighting environments. With a narrow 14° beam angle, it is ideal for focused, high-intensity accent lighting applications. The high colour rendering index (CRI >90) ensures true and vibrant colour representation, making it suitable for retail, galleries, and premium interior spaces. It operates on a constant current of 700mA at 20.75V DC using dual drivers, ensuring stable and reliable performance. The overall diameter of Ø680x59mm with a cut-out size of Ø615mm allows for precise recessed installation, making it a perfect choice for large-scale architectural lighting applications.
